headline: Airfares Are Up 27% Over the Past Year
summary: Airfare inflation slowed in June, but that will be of little comfort to those yet to book their summer vacation.  Airline fares rose just 0.2% in June, easing from 2.7% in May and 2.8% in April as jet fuel prices pulled back after surging in the previous months.  Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian said fares will stay elevated even if fuel prices moderate during the company’s earnings call Friday.

headline: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) Stock May Be A Bargain After AI Portfolio Shift
summary: Berkshire Hathaway stock has delivered an 82.2% return over the past 5 years, yet the latest intrinsic value checks and earnings multiples both still point to the shares trading at a discount to what the business may be worth. That mix of solid long term returns and a perceived valuation gap is drawing fresh attention as Greg Abel reshapes the portfolio toward large technology and AI holdings. headline: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) Just Backed Delta, And That Says A Lot About Greg Abel
summary: Greg Abel, the new CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B), has taken a significant position in Delta Air Lines. The move contrasts with Warren Buffett's earlier skepticism toward airlines, which he once called a "bottomless pit". Delta is currently performing well, making the new allocation an important signal of Berkshire's evolving investment approach. Berkshire Hathaway sits at the center of multiple sectors, from insurance and energy to railroads and consumer brands, so any visible...
